1.content:
You're walking to the store, you didn't like to go there unless absolutely necessary, there usually were to many potential predators around, you had lost some of your closest friends to different predators, they got gobbled up in rather mundane situations, for instance, like going to buy grocery's or picking their car up at the auto repair shop, bottom line was, you never knew exactly were your predator might be, you had one friend who was really paranoid and careful, it didn't help though, such a simple task as going down to the laundry room in his own apartment house got him eaten by some unknown predator, who simply got back into his or hers apartment to digests its meal.

So now you maybe have a better understanding to why I think twice before I put myself in a public situation, up until the end of high school nobody have to worry about being eaten, but as soon as high school ends and college begin it is free picking.

I parked my car and began walking towards the store, a group of teenagers hung out close to the entrance, it was three girls and two boys, they all looked to be between maybe fifteen to eighteen, hard to tell these days, if someone were to consume an other human in an early age their body developed faster than their peers.

One of the boys stood leaned back against the store's wall, he had an enormous human shaped bulge in his stomach, it still visible moved about within the gastric prison that were the teenagers belly, they were passing around a blunt, talking and laughing, the other boy obviously had also consumed some poor soul, but it must have been a lot earlier in the day, whoever it used to be were now nothing more than a rounded out bulge that protruded from the boy's tummy, none of the girls had any bulges.

When you walked past the group you made eye contact with the boy with the squirming belly, he winked one eye at you and grinned widely, the girls giggled when they saw you.
1.title: Vore world

11.content:
You put this potential danger in the back of your mind for when you leave the store, you enter and begin gathering your groceries in your cart, most of the other costumers kept to them selves with the same mind set as you, they kept their distance to each other, you stood by the freezer, looking for your favorite hamburgers, when a family walked up to the same freezer you were at, the family consisted of a man a woman and a small girl, the man seemed to be in his mid twenties as well as his wife, their child maybe six or seven years old, the man were very large, not fat though but he just had a large built body, you caught the mans eyes for a brief moment, he didn't seem to acknowledge you, but then you saw his tongue appear in between his lips and lick it's way across, his eye's were still expressionless, they found what they looked for and went on their way.

You were almost done, you just needed some spices, you found the shelf and scanned it for what you looked for, then something bump into your back, or rather someone, you spun around and saw the large family man from before, but he didn't look on you, it seemed that he also scanned the shelf for something, he were a lot taller than you, your head only reached to his chest, you would had found yourself intimidated by this huge beast but since he just looked for his grocery and were here with his family you felt that you could relax, so you turned back and kept looking for your spices, but then two large heavy hands landed on your shoulders and pulled you back, you felt what you presumed were the large man's body push up against your back, you felt his chest at the back of your head and his belly at your back, it was soft, a low groan came from it, you felt small vibrations on your back from within the mans guts.

You felt frozen, you couldn't utter a word or knew what to do or think, was this how your short life would end, eaten by some family man at the grocery store.
“If you'd ever wanna meet up and have some fun, give me a call” The large man said right into your ear.
“I could satisfy your every desire, and then, well, you would satisfy mine”

He put one of his large hands down into your pocket, your penis jumped to excitement, the man gave it a gentle squeeze through your pockets fabric, then he walked away, you stood still for a while, still a bit shocked, you found a note that the man had put in your pocket it said “Call for a good time” with a smiley licking it's lips.

1111.content:
You shuddered and got what you needed and headed for the checkout, you paid and began packing your grocery's, some kids at a bench at the end of the checkout were being loud and obnoxious.

Kids... you hated them.. they could act how ever they pleased without fear of being eaten, they still had several years of comforting safety ahead of them, it were four of them, four boys, they looked to be around eight or ten year old's, they were pushing each other, laughing and talking loudly.

When you were all packed and ready to leave you walk past the bench on your way out.
“Hey guys! Would you mind? Keep the noise down, this isn't a playground” you tell them.
They just look at you for a while, before breaking out into laughter.
“Hahaha, so what?! What you gonna do huh?” one of the boys with blonde hair said.
“Yea, hahaha, by the way, don't you have anyone's belly to fill” a black haired boy said.

“Fucking kids” you mutter and leave.

When you got outside you keep an eye out for the teenagers from before, but they were nowhere to be seen, you walk along the stores wall and turn left where it ends, you stop abruptly, you almost put your foot into a huge mound of shit, it wasn't just some dog shit, no, you felt sad as you looked into the empty eye sockets of the skull protruding from the reeking pile.

You hear laughter, you see the group of teens from before in the distance, laughing at you, one of the boys looks much thinner than before.

You turn and take a longer way home so that you don't risk bumping into them.

11111.content:
You walk along the side walk, from nowhere something small hits the back of your head, you feel a brief sting of pain, you turn around, the black haired boy from the store is throwing small rocks at you and laughing.

“Hahaha, are you gonna get angry again??” the boy laughs while continuing to throw rocks at you.

“You little shit!” You drop your grocery bags at your sides and begin running towards the boy, you're not sure what to do, but you wanted to hurt this little brat so badly.

The black haired boy's eye's grew wide, he apparently didn't expect this reaction from you, he turned around and bolted, but your steps were a lot bigger and you quickly began to close in on the small child, not that you were to much taller, but you were at least a grown up dammit!

Suddenly the boy made a ninety degree turn into an alleyway, you got a bit surprised but you sprinted after him, it was a long alleyway, then it took yet another ninety degree turn and then there was an blind alley, with some trash cans along its walls and a door into the building.
The black haired boy stood in the middle of the blind alley, but he didn't look scared or nervous at all, but you didn't give it any thought, you were still furious at the boy, you started walking towards him, but from nowhere someone wrapped a wire around your throat from behind and pulled you backwards, you fell back on the ground, but your attacker still had you in a choke hold, he loomed above your face, it was the blonde boy from the store, and the two other boy's were with him, they held your arms down to the floor with their entire body weight, you could only kick your legs weakly before you passed out.

You woke up, your vision were blurred at first, you could hear the voices of little boys around you, you tried to move but both your hands and feet were tied up.

“Hey look, he's awakening!”

Your vision finally focused, you could see the four boys from the store in front of you, the black haired that you were chasing, the blonde and the two brown haired boys, they gathered around you when they noticed that you were conscious.

“HMMMMPF MMMMM!” your mouth were taped shut.

“um, what should we do with him guys?” the blonde asked.

Why don't we...
